name: Turkey Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Green chili peppers (4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the turkey with sour cream, cheese, and salt in a bowl.
2. Heat the corn oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Dip each tortilla into the hot oil until softened, then drain on paper towels.
4. Stuff each tortilla with the turkey mixture.
5. Roll up the tortillas seam side down and arrange them side-by-side in a shallow baking dish.
6. Prepare the sauce: Rinse and chop the green chili peppers. Sauté in garlic and oil.
7. Add stewed tomatoes, onions, salt, oregano, and water to the sautéed peppers. Simmer uncovered for about 30 minutes until thickened.
8. Pour the prepared chili sauce over the enchiladas.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20-30 minutes.
10. Let the enchiladas set for 5-10 minutes before serving.
Note: Excellent.
